summary: Iteration 2 retest (frontend only) of MerchCraft AI. All 3 requested retest items PASS: (1) Admin hard-refresh on /admin no longer redirects to /auth — `ready` gate in AuthContext + Admin.jsx works; (2) AI Studio /studio generate now succeeds end-to-end — download-btn appears, generated t-shirt artwork visible in canvas-area within ~30s after EMERGENT_LLM_KEY recharge; (3) Sanity critical path (demo customer login → product detail → add-to-cart → /cart → /checkout COD → /account) completes with order visible in account (4 orders present). No new issues found.

issues: After clicking Place Order, URL remains on /checkout instead of redirecting to a confirmation/order-success page. The order IS created (visible in /account), but a confirmation route or toast-redirect would improve UX. Not a blocker.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Redirect to /account or /order/:id after successful checkout to confirm to user that order was placed (currently stays on /checkout).
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext `ready` flag correctly gates protected routes (Admin/Cart/Account) — fix verified working on hard refresh.
Admin.jsx renders `admin-loading` testid while ready=false — clean pattern.
/api/ai/generate-image integration via emergentintegrations OpenAIImageGeneration works after key recharge; returns base64 PNG which UI renders correctly.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded products and accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 1 issues both resolved. AuthContext `ready` flag pattern is the canonical fix — any new protected route must use `const { user, ready } = useAuth()` and short-circuit useEffect until ready=true. AI image generation works end-to-end as long as EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget is funded. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_merchcraft.py remains valid for regression.

rca_of_the_issue.retest1_admin_refresh: RESOLVED. /app/frontend/src/lib/auth.jsx exposes `ready` (set true after /auth/me rehydrate completes). Admin.jsx (and Cart.jsx, Account.jsx) now short-circuit `useEffect` with `if (!ready) return;` before any redirect — verified by Playwright reload on /admin staying on the page and rendering [data-testid='admin-page'].
rca_of_the_issue.retest2_ai_generate: RESOLVED. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget recharged. Live test: prompt 'A vibrant cyberpunk t-shirt design with neon dragon' generated a clean PNG visible in canvas-area, [data-testid='download-btn'] became visible, toast 'Artwork ready' shown.
rca_of_the_issue.sanity_checkout: WORKING. Demo customer login → add product to cart → COD checkout → order persists and appears in /account (saw 4 orders including the new one).
